reviewFocus: Check whether the reviewer catches recurring failure modes before the packet is treated as ready for another live run.
Flag missing evidence handles, stale deterministic inputs, repeated command noise, and verification-wrapper mismatches with generic reusable findings only.
Keep source retrieval, command execution, tracker routing, approval, and domain interpretation caller-owned.
Prefer stable generic finding keys when one recurring failure mode stays reusable across repeated review packets.
outOfScope: Do not infer private repositories, tracker state, private policy, user data, or live operator intent from the synthetic packet.
Do not approve publication, execution, remediation ownership, scheduling, deployment, or any other real-world action.
Do not treat synthetic evidence labels, wrapper notes, or command snippets as proof outside this eval pack.
